subcodes.first_line: The marriage of the Bedouin in the desert is exceedingly simple: the bridegroom standeth upon one stone and the bride upon another [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرس العرب فی البادیة بسیط جداًالعرس یقف علی حجرٍ والعروس تقف علی حجراٍ
subcodes.subjects: @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @equality of men and women
